SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-13-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
LISA KWONG/ Defendant in Pro Per;
GUY SHANI FOR SHANI REAL ESTATE INVESTMENTS, LLC/ Plaintiff in Pro Per.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. All parties are sworn.

Apellant/ Defendant testifies on her own behalf.

Respondent/ Plaintiff testifies on his own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduce:

Exhibit 1 - email dated 9/23/21
Exhibit 2 - email dated 9/23/21
Exhibit 3 - email dated 9/23/21 including screen shots of whats app text thread
Exhibit 4 - estimate from barsoi inc
Exhibit 5 - photographs of subject property

At the conclusion of the hearing , The Court affirms previous judgment order signed in open court. Judge: Honorable WILLIAM LYNN; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Reporter: NOT REPORTED.
